common.tagline: Find trusted household help near you

landing.heroTitle: Find Trusted Household Help Near You
landing.heroSubtitle: Connect directly with maids, cooks, drivers, and more in your neighbourhood. No middlemen, no commissions.
landing.step1Desc: Sign up with your phone number and tell us what you need — or what you offer.
landing.step2Desc: Browse workers or jobs in your area. Filter by job type, distance, and salary.
landing.step3Desc: Found a match? Click 'I'm Interested' to share your details and connect via phone or WhatsApp.
landing.forWorkersDesc: Create your profile, showcase your skills, and let employers find you. No agency fees.
landing.forEmployersDesc: Post jobs, search for workers nearby, and hire directly. Save thousands on placement fees.

auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your phone number to get started
auth.otpSubtitle: We sent a verification code to {phone}

onboarding.title: Welcome to Kaamdha!
onboarding.subtitle: How would you like to use Kaamdha?
onboarding.iAmWorkerDesc: I offer household services like cooking, cleaning, driving, etc.
onboarding.iAmEmployerDesc: I need household help — maid, cook, driver, etc.
